title: New `pricing_version` field on app subscription queries

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
The new pricing_version field on app_subscription queries returns the subscription’s pricing version. This field is only available on API versions 2024-01 and later.

query {
  app_subscription {
    pricing_version
   	billing_period
    renewal_date
  }
}
